chunks.title: Guidelines for Worship and Vows
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit of instruction regarding proper attitude in the house of God and the management of vows.

chunks.title: Observations on Power and Wealth
chunks.reason: An argumentative section observing political corruption, the futility of loving money, and the contrast between laborers and the rich.

chunks.title: The Evil of Hoarded Riches
chunks.reason: A specific argument describing the tragedy of wealth lost before death and the resulting vexation of the rich man.

chunks.title: The Gift of Enjoyment
chunks.reason: A concluding exhortation encouraging the enjoyment of life's simple pleasures as a divine gift.
